findings.description: Media placeholders (Stitch project) in Hero are not yet replaced with final horizontal video assets, affecting the premium industrial feel.
findings.remediation: Replace static/placeholder media with high-fidelity video loop from Stitch project (ID: 3531647153783207213).

findings.description: Offer layer currently uses static mock data instead of the newly designed Container/Presenter pattern.
findings.remediation: Implement the Container/Presenter pattern in `src/components/sections/` for Offer Layer decoupling.

findings.description: Calculator lacks the SVG/Canvas live 2D preview defined in the Conversion Layer design.
findings.remediation: Implement SVG dynamic preview for channel letters based on user selections in Calculator.tsx.

recommendations: Proceed with /blueprint to generate tasks for the SVG Calculator Preview.
Inject video assets to finalize Brand Layer execution.
